---
title: "Noticing Alcohol Scripts"
format: html
---

# Rewriting Alcohol Scripts

Once alcohol scripts are identified<!--reference alcohol_script_1.qmd-->, they can be *challenged and rewritten*. Not all thoughts are facts. Many are learned patterns.

By consciously replacing unhelpful scripts with realistic, recovery-supportive ones, you can change both your emotional response and your behavior in high-risk situations.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/quill.jpg?raw=true){fig-align="center"}

## Evaluate an alcohol-related thought and create a healthier alternative below

### 1. Original Script

Write one alcohol script you’ve noticed:

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

### 2. Reality Check

-   What evidence supports this thought?

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

-   What evidence does **not** support it?

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

### 3. Cost vs. Benefit

-   Short-term effect of following this script:

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

-   Longer-term consequences:

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

### 4. Rewrite the Script

Create a new, more helpful thought:

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

::: callout
Examples:

-   “I can enjoy this without drinking.”
-   “I don’t have to do what others are doing.”
-   “I care more about how I feel tomorrow.”
:::

### 5. Make It Actionable

When the old script shows up, I will:

1.  Notice it

2.  Say my new script

3.  Do this action: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

### 6. Mental Rehearsal

Imagine yourself in the situation:

-   What happens first?
-   What do you say to yourself?
-   What do you do differently?
